stack-anatomy.instruction: Map the layers of a full-stack AI app. For each layer (frontend, API, database, AI, deployment), name the tool you'd use and why.
stack-anatomy.successMessage: You just drew the architecture diagram in words.

supabase-101.instruction: Write a prompt to generate a Supabase SQL migration for a 'projects' table with id, name, description, owner_id (FK to auth.users), created_at, status.
supabase-101.successMessage: Production-ready table design. SQL migrations are the foundation of reliable backends.

vercel-deploy.instruction: Describe the deployment pipeline from git push to live site on Vercel. Include: build trigger, env variables, rollback process.
vercel-deploy.successMessage: Understanding the deploy pipeline means you'll debug production issues in minutes.

edge-functions.instruction: Write a prompt to create a Supabase Edge Function that receives a webhook, validates the payload, and inserts into an 'events' table.
edge-functions.successMessage: Edge functions are your serverless backend. You just designed a real webhook handler.

database-patterns.instruction: Design an RLS policy for a 'documents' table: users read/write own docs, admins read all.
database-patterns.successMessage: RLS is security at the database layer. Secure by default.

auth-and-tokens.instruction: Explain the JWT auth flow in a Supabase app: from login to authenticated API call. What tokens, where stored?
auth-and-tokens.successMessage: Auth is the most important part of your stack to understand deeply.

make-com-101.instruction: Design a Make.com scenario connecting your AI app to an external service. Include trigger, processing, and output modules with data flow.
make-com-101.successMessage: Make.com is the glue layer. You just designed a real integration.

webhooks-deep-dive.instruction: A webhook is failing silently. List your debugging checklist: what to check first, second, third. Include tools.

wire-it-all.instruction: Draw the data flow: user action -> frontend -> API -> AI -> database -> response. Include error handling at each step.
wire-it-all.successMessage: End-to-end thinking separates full-stack builders from tutorial followers.

launch-checklist.instruction: Create a pre-launch checklist for your AI app. Cover security, performance, monitoring, error handling, UX. At least 10 items.
launch-checklist.successMessage: This checklist is your insurance policy against launch-day disasters.
